_comment: WC2026 Group I, MD3. Standings before: France 6, Norway 6, Senegal 0 (1-3 France, 1-3 Norway), Iraq 0 (1-4 Norway, 1-3 France). Both ELIMINATED -> dead rubber. Senegal the better side on paper (quality African team having a poor group) vs a weak Iraq (conceded 7). MOTIVATION CAVEAT: do NOT downgrade either for being eliminated (the South Africa lesson -- a pressure-free side can play freely); and dead-rubber GOAL VOLUME is high-variance (the Morocco-Haiti lesson) -- treat goals reads with low confidence. Senegal a modest favourite. Home = Senegal, away = Iraq. Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Both eliminated on 0 points: a pride match. Senegal the stronger side on paper; Iraq weak (conceded 7). Low-stakes, high-variance dead rubber.

home.name: Senegal
notes: Quality side that underperformed the group; scored 2, conceded 6. attack 1.05.
Eliminated, but no motivation downgrade (South Africa lesson).

away.name: Iraq
notes: Dead rubber -> goals high-variance, low confidence.
